results.title: Hardware Overview - SparkFun OpenScale - IoT
results.snippet: The ESP32 Pico Mini hosts the OpenScale - IoT firmware that controls the board's other components and handles all serial and wireless communication. The board runs the module at 3.3V and firmware defaults to enable Bluetooth, WiFi as well as both the USB and serial UART ports.
